item.name: Kirin Fife
item.description: A magicked pipe that, when blown, summons the mythical Kirin to your side.

mount.name: Kirin
mount.action: Summon forth Kirin, Far Eastern king of the beasts.
mount.description: Ask any man in Othard who rules the realm of beasts, and you will receive the same answer─Kirin. It is believed that the lionlike creature has walked the eastern lands for over a thousand years and will only answer the call of a hero it has deemed worthy.
mount.tooltip:
Even folk in the Far East
'eard that tale, I reckon.
- Trachraet
